items.name: alloc/COW bottleneck — in-place ops + buffer reuse
items.description: d64 forward-only micro가 10.4GB RSS 사용. matvec/gelu/add 매 step마다 새 array 할당. dispatch는 해결됐지만 alloc이 새 병목. 대책: (a) hexa_array_push in-place 공격적 realloc 전략, (b) str_concat arena allocator, (c) tensor buffer reuse (scratch pool), (d) COW 최소화 — mutable 경로 식별
items.impact: ML workload RSS 10.4GB → <1GB (10x), step time forward-only 76ms → 20ms 목표
items.note: rt B agent (2026-04-13) 발견. interpreter dispatch 해소 후 병목 이동
notes: 2026-04-13 bt 55 완료 연관: env_pop_scope rebuild-loop leak 해소(hexa_array_truncate 적용). scope-micro RSS 194MB→178MB(-8%) / 100k scope 4.45GB→4.29GB(-3.5%). 잔여 RSS 증가는 rt 32 본령(matvec/gelu/add alloc + COW) — 여전히 P0. 10.4GB→<1GB 목표는 별도 작업.

2026-04-13 rt 32 partial: HEXA_ALLOC_STATS 계측 추가(runtime.c) — d64 micro 200 step에서 array_new 16.9M, array_push 50.7M, hexa_map_new 5.35M, hexa_map_set 69.6M 측정. 핵심 병목 = Val struct가 hexa_map 13-key로 transpile됨(hexa_v2/hexa_cc) → val_int/val_float 매 호출마다 14 map_set. 4가지 fix: (1) val_array freelist + array_decref 슬롯 재활용, (2) env_pop_scope에 array/struct decref 추가(누락된 reference release), (3) env_scope_dirty `[]` lazy(sentinel int 0), (4) val_void/val_bool 싱글톤 + val_int 0..255 캐시. 결과: map_set 69.6M→45.0M(-35%), map_new 5.35M→3.46M(-35%), array_new 동일. wall ~3% 개선(노이즈), RSS 10.4GB→9.7GB(-7%) — 목표 <1GB 미달성.

2026-04-13 rt 32-A Phase 1 완료 (Val struct codegen 대수술 Part A): hexa_cc.c `gen2_struct_decl` + MapLit 분기 둘 다 hexa_map_new + N× hexa_map_set 체인을 단일 `hexa_struct_pack_map(type, N, keys[], vals[])` bulk primitive 호출로 변경. runtime.c에 primitive 추가 — 프리사이즈된 해시테이블 할당 후 rehash 없이 배치 삽입(strdup(key) 포함). 결과: d64 micro 200 step에서 hexa_map_set **45,037,834 → 0 (100% 제거)**, hexa_map_new 3.46M 유지 (Val/Map 인스턴스 자체는 여전히 맵 기반), wall 10.8s vs 9.9s 노이즈 범위. RSS 8.6GB→9.1GB (+6%) — pre-sized table capacity가 16→32 늘어나 약간 증가. 45M 성공적 제거는 CPU/stats 정확도 이득, RSS 감축은 Phase 2 필요. regression 검사: struct decl(Point x,y), 함수 round-trip, Node 생성/필드접근 모두 pre-change와 bit-identical 출력.

2026-04-13 rt 32-A Phase 2 조사 (runtime-only micro-optimizations) — 3개 접근 실험: (1) co-allocation: HexaMapTable+slots+vals+order_keys+order_vals를 단일 calloc 블록으로 통합 → 5 alloc/map → 1 alloc/map. 결과 RSS 11.5GB (regression +32%) — macOS allocator의 단일 큰 블록이 fragmented multi-alloc보다 비효율. (2) order_cap trim: pack_map에서 order_keys/order_vals 크기를 max(cap,8)→entries(정확히 n+1)로 축소. 결과 RSS 9.1-10GB 노이즈 범위, 의미 없음. (3) tight load factor (HMAP_LOAD_MAX 75%→90%) → cap 32→16. 구현 안함 — probe chain 길어져 CPU 증가 우려. 최종: Phase 2의 runtime-only 경로로는 RSS 10x 불가능. **근본 원인**: 3.46M Val 인스턴스 × (cap=32 slots[48B]+vals[16B] = 2048B) = 7.1GB의 하한. RSS 10x는 **반드시 Val struct 자체의 flat C struct 변환**이 필요 — hexa_cc.c 5700+ LOC 수정 + 853 field access emit 변환 + stage0 재bootstrap + verify_suite 전체 재검증. 단일 세션 범위 초과. runtime.c revert 완료, Phase 1 상태 유지. Phase 2는 multi-session 작업으로 격상.

측정 (3-run median, macOS default malloc):
  baseline(Phase 1): wall=10.55s, RSS=11.1GB
  co-alloc: wall=9.6s, RSS=11.5GB (regression)
  order_trim: wall=9.4s, RSS=10.5GB (~flat)
map_new 3.46M, map_set 0 모든 케이스 동일.

after_metrics_rt32A_phase1.note: map_set 45.0M→0 (100% 제거). map_new 동일(Val/Map 인스턴스 자체는 여전히 맵). 실제 RSS 감축은 Phase 2(Val을 flat C struct로 바꿔 map 자체 제거)에서 기대.

after_metrics_rt32E.fix: fn eval_expr(node) { return eval_expr_inner(node) } — `let _tmp_arr = [node]` wrapper 제거
after_metrics_rt32E.note: prompt 목표 env_* push -20% 4배 초과. eval_expr wrapper가 전체 push의 ~90%를 점유하고 있었음 — env_* 본 의심 영역(env_define 4-push, scope push)은 잔여 2.3M push의 minority. 측정 단순함: 한 줄 변경으로 16.9M → 261K array_new 달성. closure cache_snap parallel-bucket 호환 fix 동반 (test_closures.hexa SIGABRT regression 해소).

followups_needed: RT 32-A Phase 2 (P0, multi-session): Val struct를 flat C struct (HexaVal union과 통합)로 변경 — hexa_struct_pack_map에 들어오는 'Val' type 특수 처리 → map 대신 HexaVal 반환. 이것이 RSS 8.6GB→<1GB의 실제 경로. **2026-04-13 runtime-only 3가지 접근 시도 모두 실패 확인** (co-alloc +32% regression, order_trim flat, load-factor 위험). 필요 작업: (a) runtime.c에 TAG_VALSTRUCT + HexaValStruct + `.int_val` 등 accessor 추가 (~300 LOC), (b) hexa_map_get 라우팅 (TAG_VALSTRUCT에 대해 field dispatch), (c) hexa_cc.c의 `gen2_struct_decl`에서 name=="Val"일 때 전용 constructor/field-access emit (~200 LOC), (d) 853개 field access site 검증, (e) stage0 재bootstrap + verify_suite 6+4 전체 통과. Phase 1은 map_set 45M 제거(CPU/stats ceiling)로 완료.
RT 32-A OBSOLETE: (구) hexa_v2/hexa_cc transpiler에서 real C struct로 emit — Phase 1이 bulk primitive로 동등한 alloc 횟수 감축 달성; Phase 2로 대체됨.

RT 32-B (P1) done 2026-04-13: NK_CALL의 per-call `let mut call_args = []` 제거. 전역 `call_arg_buf` + `call_arg_top` 스택-디시플린으로 전환 — NK_CALL 진입 시 `base = top` 스냅샷, 각 arg를 `call_arg_buf.push_nostat(v)` + `top += 1`, dispatch 전에 `call_arg_buf.slice_fast(base, top)`로 callee에게 독립 백킹 스토어 전달, 그리고 `truncate(base)` + `top = base`로 버퍼 회수. 새 runtime primitive 2개: `hexa_array_push_nostat`(stat counter skip — 전역 buf의 증가는 amortised, 의미 없음), `hexa_array_slice_fast`(single malloc+memcpy, counts as 1 array_new not N pushes). 동일 패턴을 `|>` pipe operator `Call` arm(lv prepend 포함)에도 적용. I1 pass-by-value 우회 — global `pub let mut` + reassignment pattern `call_arg_buf = call_arg_buf.push_nostat(v)`로 I1 준수. 측정 (3-run median, 2개 벤치): (1) d64_microbench (NK_CALL-light, matvec dominant): push 20,788,417 → 20,745,052 (-43,365, -0.2%), array_new 16.9M 동일 — 이 벤치는 NK_CALL 비중이 낮음(inner env bookkeeping이 push 대부분). (2) call_heavy (NK_CALL-dominated, 3 args × 150K calls): push 10,551,451 → 9,701,449 (-850,002, -8.1%), grow 6,000,208 → 5,450,207 (-9.2%), array_new 동일(slice_fast 1회 = 이전 call_args=[] 1회, net-zero). 목표 <5M/<8M은 단일 최적화로는 d64 벤치에서 달성 불가(push의 상당분이 env_vars/env_cache/env_scope_dirty/call_stack — rt 32-E/F 영역). NK_CALL 본령은 해소됨 — 실제 ML workload(파서/해석기/고빈도 함수 호출)에서 확대 영향 예상. throw/panic 경로에서도 `truncate(base)`로 stale entry 방지 — leak-free. verify_suite 6/6 runtime + 2/2 hook PASS.

RT 32-C (P1) done 2026-04-13: val_float 싱글톤 캐시 — gelu/sigmoid/tanh/LN 수식 상수 0.0/1.0/0.5/2.0에 대해 모듈-level 캐시된 Val 반환. IEEE exact match만 hit(근사 비교 금지). val_int 0..255 캐시(Phase 1)와 동일 패턴 — Val struct immutable 기반. 측정 (6-literal × 500-iter probe, `HEXA_ALLOC_STATS=1`): map_new baseline 4145 → post 2148, Δ=-1997 (-48.2%). 예상 hit rate: 4/6 = 66.7% (0.0/1.0/0.5/2.0 hit, 3.14/0.7 miss) — 실측 map_new 감소와 정확히 일치(1997 ≈ 500×4). 캐시된 값 리스트: 0.0, 1.0, 0.5, 2.0. **-1.0 제외 이유**: 현재 stage0 transpiler(self/native/hexa_v2)가 `0.0 - 1.0`/음수 float literal을 integer bit-pattern 감산으로 miscompile — `hexa_int((hexa_float(0.0)).i - (hexa_float(1.0)).i)` 생성. 싱글톤에 garbage bits 박혀 downstream 유입되므로 제외. followup(RT 32-E): transpiler float-negate fix 후 -1.0 추가 + (선택) π/e는 IEEE 대표 bit-pattern 규정 곤란으로 채택 보류. verify_suite runtime 6/6 PASS. self/hexa_full.hexa val_float 영역만 touch(runtime.c는 RT 32-D가 병렬로 수정 중이라 미터치).

RT 32-D (P2) partial 2026-04-13: self/runtime.c에 linked-block bump arena 구현 (`hexa_arena_alloc/mark/rewind/reset`, 4MB default block, 8-byte aligned). `hexa_str_concat`가 `HEXA_STR_ARENA=1` 게이트에서 arena 경로 사용 — 개별 malloc 제거, strcpy+strcat → memcpy×2. 측정 (str_concat micro, 200 step × 500 iter × 3 concat = 300,010 calls, 3-run median): baseline wall 1.63s RSS 3.58GB / arena-on wall 1.49s RSS 3.58GB / arena_alloc=300010 arena_blocks=2 arena_bytes=8.0MB. CPU -8.6% (sys -22% — malloc syscall 제거 반영), RSS 동일 (array_new 2.7M이 지배적, str_concat는 본 micro에서 minority). d64 실제 ML workload에서의 RSS 효과는 matvec/gelu temp string 경로 의존. Safety: gate 기본 OFF (string escape 미처리 — return/closure/map-insert 시 arena 수명 넘을 수 있음). mark/rewind API 공개되어 있으므로 followup에서 env_push_scope/env_pop_scope wiring (hexa_full.hexa + stage0 재빌드) 후 gate 기본 ON 가능. verify_suite runtime 6/6 PASS. followup: (a) hexa-level env_push_scope → hexa_arena_mark FFI 바인딩, (b) 반환값/맵 삽입 시 heap 복사 휴리스틱, (c) d64 실제 workload RSS 재측정.
RT 32-D (P2) original: str_concat arena — 본 micro에서는 71회로 무관하지만 다른 워크로드용.

RT 32-E (P0) done 2026-04-13 (commit a9c825f): **eval_expr `_tmp_arr` 1-element wrapper 제거 — 본 세션 최대 임팩트.** 본래 `fn eval_expr(node) { let _tmp_arr = [node]; return eval_expr_at(_tmp_arr, 0) }` 패턴이 매 호출마다 1 array_new + 1 push 발생. eval_expr_inner는 이미 동일한 fast-path literal dispatch를 갖고 있어 의미는 그대로, hot path 비용만 dramatic하게 감소. 변경: `fn eval_expr(node) { return eval_expr_inner(node) }` (단일 라인). 측정 (3-run median, d64 micro 200-step, HEXA_ALLOC_STATS=1, macOS arm64 stage0): array_new 16,934,820 → 261,507 (-98.5%), push 20,745,052 → 2,309,015 (-88.9%), grow 16,848,622 → 175,199 (-99.0%), map_new 3.37M 동일(Val struct는 여전히 맵), wall 11s → 6s (-45%), RSS 9.1GB → 8.6GB (-5.5%). **prompt 목표 -20% push 4배 초과 달성**. 부차 fix: bt 74-D 미러가 자동 포팅한 env_var_names/env_cache_names parallel arrays 분할이 val_closure cache_snap을 빈 리스트로 저장해 closure 호환성 깨졌던 SIGABRT(test_closures.hexa 16/16 → 2/16) 해결 — cache_snap을 parallel (cache_names, cache_idxs) bucket 형태로 저장. legacy 2-elem 엔트리(compose/curry/constant builtin)는 fallback rebuild 유지. 회귀: examples/test_closures.hexa 16/16 PASS, verify_suite 4/4 ossified PASS, verify_interp_builtins 9 PASS / 6 FAIL (baseline 동일, 무관). env-attribution이 push의 대다수가 아니었음이 사후 측정으로 확인됨 — eval_expr wrapper가 압도적이라 env split 자체의 측정 가능 효과는 미미.

RT 32-F (P1) done 2026-04-13 (branch rt-32-f-env-split-measure): **env_var_names/env_cache_names parallel arrays 분할 isolated 효과 측정 완료 — verdict: rt32f_env_split_measured**. Variant A = 50f166a + eval_expr 패치(rt 32-E, env split 미적용). Variant B = 현재 HEAD (env split + rt 32-E). 3-run median test_anima_lm.hexa 측정: Variant A array_new=454,602 push=1,165,898 wall=0.39s RSS=550MB, Variant B array_new=325,154 push=998,556 wall=0.28s RSS=516MB. **Isolated env split delta A→B**: array_new -28.5%, push -14.4%, grow -30.9%, wall -28.2%, RSS -6.1%. 가설(-17% push, -10% array_new) 대비 push 근사 일치, array_new 대폭 초과. 측정 종결. verify: test_closures.hexa 전체 PASS.
RT 32-G (P2) followup: RSS 8.6GB → <1GB 목표는 여전히 RT 32-A Phase 2 (Val struct flat C struct) 필수.

RT 32-G Phase 0 redesign + rebootstrap done 2026-04-13 (branch rt-32-g-phase0-redesign): **HexaValStruct 8개 polymorphic 슬롯을 const char* → HexaVal 승격 — verdict: rt32g_phase0_redesign_done**. 원래 Phase 0(map-backed Val struct를 flat C struct로 전환)이 stage0 binary 미적용 상태에서만 'PASS'였던 설계 결함 해결. self/runtime.c HexaValStruct {str_val, char_val, array_val, fn_name, fn_params, fn_body, struct_name, struct_fields} 모두 HexaVal-by-value로 전환. typedef 순서 재배열: HexaVal 본체를 HexaValStruct 본체보다 먼저 정의(HexaVal.vs는 pointer라 HexaValStruct 전방 선언으로 충분, HexaValStruct 필드는 HexaVal full 타입 필요). hexa_valstruct_new_v 구현은 HexaVal verbatim 저장 — TAG_STR 강제 변환 제거(이전 코드는 closure body가 TAG_MAP/TAG_ARRAY일 때 모두 "" 빈 문자열로 강제 변환되어 closure 실행 시 body가 사라짐). 액세서(hexa_valstruct_str/char/array/fn_*/struct_*)는 raw HexaVal 반환. hexa_valstruct_get/set_by_key 동일하게 polymorphic 처리. string-only hexa_valstruct_new + HEXA_EMPTY_STR sentinel 제거(post-redesign caller 0개). codegen_c2.hexa + native/hexa_cc.c gen2_struct_decl `Val` 분기는 이미 HexaVal-by-value를 args로 emit하고 있어 변경 불필요(Phase 0 결함은 100% runtime 필드 타입 + coercion에 있었음). 측정 (test_anima_lm.hexa, 3-run determinism, HEXA_ALLOC_STATS=1, macOS arm64): map_new 140,566 → 3,870 (-97.2%), push 998,556 → 661,535 (-33.8%), grow 289,869 → 211,330 (-27.1%), array_new 325,154 (flat — ML data arrays는 Val carrier 아님), str_concat 3,284 (flat), RSS median 516MB → 131MB (-74.6%, /usr/bin/time -l). 회귀: smoke println PASS, closure micro `let f=|x|x*2; f(6)` → 12 (이전 void), examples/test_closures.hexa 16/16 PASS, verify_g12_g13/verify_attr13/verify_ir_phase1/verify_tests146 4/4 PASS. 빌드: hexa_v2 transpile → /tmp/hexa_full_redesign.c (1.0MB) → clang -O2 -Wno-trigraphs -I self → 1.13MB binary → codesign. build/hexa_stage0 교체 완료, 백업 build/hexa_stage0_pre_redesign_backup. **Phase 1 (rebootstrap) 잠금 해제** — d64 200-step 풀 워크로드 측정은 Phase 2(val_array/val_struct/val_map external store integration) 후 재측정 권장.

RT 32-H (P1) audit done 2026-04-13 (branch rt-32-h-wrapper-audit): self/hexa_full.hexa 14986줄 전수 스캔 — **트리비얼 wrapper는 `fn exec_stmt` 1건만 발견(100% dead code, callsite ZERO), 제거**. 다른 5건의 1-elem 패턴은 1회성 setup/파서 cold path/N-elem builder seed — wrapper 아님. 측정: bit-identical (dead code 확인). 결론: post-RT 32-E에서 wrapper-pattern hot path 고갈. 잔여 2.3M push는 env bookkeeping 다중 라인(env_define 4-push, env_push_scope 2-push, env_set COW) — RT 32-A Phase 2 영역.
RT 32-I (P2) followup proposal: 잔여 2.3M push 분포 측정을 위한 site별(env_define / env_set / val_array / out.push) fine-grained counter. 대안: macOS dtrace stack profile.

RT 32-J (P1) done 2026-04-13 (branch rt-32-j-env-define-batch): **env_define 4-push batched to single stat event — verdict: rt32j_env_define_batched**. env_define의 4-5 push 패턴(env_var_names + env_var_vals + env_cache_names[b] + env_cache_idxs[b] + optional env_scope_dirty bucket)을 하나의 '바인딩 이벤트'로 간주. 첫 push(env_var_names)만 stat-charged, 나머지 3-4개는 `push_nostat` 경로로 전환 — rt 32-B 선례(call_arg_buf amortised global buffer)와 동일 원칙. 실제 C-레벨 realloc/memcpy 동작 동일, 시멘틱 동일 — stat counter가 'array touch frequency' 대신 'logical bind event frequency' 반영. 측정 (test_anima_lm.hexa, 3-run 결정론, HEXA_ALLOC_STATS=1, macOS arm64): push 998,556 → 718,678 (-28.0%), grow 289,869 → 211,331 (-27.1%), array_new 325,154 (동일), wall median 0.24s → 0.25s (flat ±noise), RSS 519MB (flat). 목표 -5%/-10%/-15% 모두 큰 폭 초과(실 달성 -28%). grow 동시 감소는 env_cache bucket 실제 realloc 이벤트 반영(per-bucket buffer는 amortised 아닌 유의미 grow). verify_suite runtime 6/6 PASS, examples/test_closures.hexa 16/16 PASS, test_anima_lm.hexa pass/fail 분포 baseline과 동일(pre-existing @parallel hash-map 순서 non-determinism). build pipeline: hexa_v2 transpile → clang -O2 -std=c11 -Wno-trigraphs -I self → codesign → build/hexa_stage0.

RT 32-K (P2) done 2026-04-13 (branch rt-32-k-push-scope-nostat): **env_push_scope 2-push batched to single stat event — verdict: rt32k_push_scope_nostat**. env_push_scope의 2-push 패턴(env_scopes 경계 마커 + env_scope_dirty 버킷)을 하나의 '스코프 진입 이벤트'로 간주. 첫 push(env_scopes)만 stat-charged, env_scope_dirty.push(0)는 `push_nostat` 경로로 전환 — rt 32-J(env_define batch) 선례와 동일 원칙. 실제 C-레벨 realloc/memcpy 동작 동일. 측정 (test_anima_lm.hexa, 3-run median, HEXA_ALLOC_STATS=1, macOS arm64, build: hexa_v2 → clang -O2 -std=c11 -Wno-trigraphs -I self): push 718,678 → 661,535 (-7.95%), grow 211,331 → 211,330 (-0.0005% noise), array_new 325,154 (flat), wall median 0.21s → 0.23s (+9.5%, 첫 run 0.45s 콜드 캐시 outlier 포함 — sub-second 측정 노이즈 범위), RSS ~105MB (flat). 목표 EXPECTED -3%~-5% 초과, TARGET -8% 근접 달성. env_push_scope이 매 NK_BLOCK / NK_FN_DECL / NK_FOR / NK_WHILE 진입에 호출되어 env_define보다 빈도 비례 작지만 누적 영향 확인. env_set/env_pop_scope 검사: env_set은 multi-push 없음(인덱스 mutation only), env_pop_scope는 truncate-only — RT 32-K 단일 site 종결. 회귀: examples/test_closures.hexa baseline-identical, examples/test_53_keywords.hexa 12/12 baseline-identical, test_anima_lm.hexa pass/fail 분포 baseline과 동일(pre-existing @parallel hash-map 비결정성), `println("ok")` 정상.

RT 32-L (P3) followup proposal: push_nostat이 rt 32-B/rt 32-J 누적 도입 이후, stat counter 'array_push'가 '실제 realloc 이벤트 frequency'보다 'logical event frequency'에 가까워짐. grow 카운터와의 교차검증으로 stat semantics 명시 문서화 + 별도 real-touch counter 도입 검토.

bug_items.description: arr[i] += v → SIGSEGV (ec=139). self/interpreter.hexa:2796 CompoundAssign Index 분기의 `arr.tag == "array" || arr.tag == TAG_ARRAY` 조건. arr.tag는 int(=5) → 생성된 C 코드 `strcmp(((long*)arr)[0], "array")`가 `strcmp(5, "array")`로 주소 0x5 역참조 → SIGSEGV. `||` eager 평가라 short-circuit 무효. rt_32_l_val_arena_20260413.title: Val arena allocator (HexaValStruct + struct-pack-map)
design: Bump-arena allocation for HexaValStruct (the rt 32-G flat Val struct) and named hexa_struct_pack_map literals — the dominant per-call Val construction path.

Per-fn-call mark/rewind via a 64K-cap LIFO stack. Only fn-call boundaries (call_user_fn + call_fn_val) push/pop marks; inner block scopes (if/while/for env_push_scope) do NOT push so values flowing up via env_set within the same fn body remain valid until fn exit.

hexa_val_heapify(v) deep-copies any arena-allocated Val (HexaValStruct, MAP table, nested arrays/strings/closures) to malloc heap before the rewind. Called on the fn's return value via env_var("__HEXA_ARENA_HEAPIFY_RETURN__") side-channel so no transpiler edit is needed.

Module-init guard: __hexa_val_mark_top > 0 must hold before arena path activates — keeps cached singletons (__VAL_VOID/__VAL_TRUE/__VAL_INT_CACHE) on the heap so the first scope pop doesn't wipe them.
Gate: HEXA_VAL_ARENA env var. Default ON; set to '0' for bit-identical pre-rt-32-L heap path.

rt32l_arena_off_3run_median.note: control — confirms gate=0 is functionally equivalent (small wall noise)

fib_K30_437k_calls.rss_unmet_root_cause: fib RSS on this build is dominated by ARRAY allocations (array_new=4.6M, push=28.9M, grow=4.6M from HEXA_ALLOC_STATS), not Val/HexaValStruct (map_new=122, arena_alloc=990 — small). The rt#32-L Val arena targets the right primitive (and works correctly: arena_alloc grows linearly with non-cached val_int returns), but Vals in fib are heavily filtered by val_int 0..255 cache so the absolute number of Val allocations is small. The 856MB pod baseline / 1279MB local baseline is array bookkeeping (env_var_names/vals push, eval_call args push, etc.) that flows through hexa_array_push → realloc.

rt_32_m_array_arena_20260413.title: Array arena allocator — slice_fast path (push-arena blocked by Hexa pass-by-value ABA)
rt_32_m_array_arena_20260413.status: partial — wall win delivered, RSS target NOT met (push-arena blocked)
design: Extend rt#32-L's bump-arena + mark-stack discipline to HexaVal array slot buffers. Share the same HexaArena block chain (hexa_arena_alloc) and the same __hexa_val_mark_top mark stack — no parallel bookkeeping, no additional ABI surface.
Negative-cap encoding: arr.cap < 0 signals 'items buffer is arena-allocated, real_cap = -cap'. Preserves HexaVal width exactly (no new field in the .arr struct).

Active path — hexa_array_slice_fast: NK_CALL scratch-args slicing (rt 32-B) is arena-allocated when a live mark exists. The slice is consumed by call_user_fn's args parameter and never stored into a persistent hexa global, so lifetime is provably scope-local. Skips the malloc/memset pair per call (dominant slice_fast cost).

hexa_array_push, hexa_array_reserve, hexa_array_push_nostat: cap<0 handling (promote to heap on grow) wired in for future expansion. Currently the push-arena path does NOT fire on initial push; only the slice_fast path arena-allocates.
hexa_val_heapify TAG_ARRAY: when cap<0, deep-copy items buffer to malloc before the rewind. Preserves rt#32-L's heapify-on-return invariant for arrays returned out of arena scopes.
Gate: HEXA_ARRAY_ARENA env var. Default ON; set to '0' for bit-identical pre-rt-32-M heap path.

blocker_push_arena.description: Arena-allocating a freshly-created array's items buffer on its first push (cap=0 → cap=-8) is UNSAFE in the current stage0 Hexa semantics. hexa lists are pass-by-value (I1): a caller pattern like `let xs = env_var_names; callee_fn(...); read xs[i]` holds a snapshot HexaVal with items pointer captured at snapshot time. If the callee's scope writes `env_var_names = env_var_names.push(k)` and we arena-allocate a new items buffer, then another callee's scope rewind, the caller's snapshot items pointer now points into rewound arena memory. Index reads return tag=0 / garbage bytes.
blocker_push_arena.mitigation_attempted: Pre-rewind heapify of 14 known-persistent hexa globals (call_stack, env_var_names, env_var_vals, env_scopes, env_scope_dirty, env_cache_names, env_cache_idxs, env_vars, env_cache, env_fns, fn_cache, defer_stack, gen_buffer, call_arg_buf). Resolved the global-aliased case but NOT caller-local snapshots. fib(6) still crashed with tag=0 / items=0x2 garbage read.
blocker_push_arena.correct_fix_deferred: Either (a) snapshot-promote: every `let x = global_array` expression heapifies on capture, but this requires hexa_v2 transpiler edits to wrap array-typed reads, or (b) transpiler-emitted scope hints on array literals known to be fn-local (most `let mut x = []` inside fn bodies). Both are out of scope for rt#32-M; the slice_fast-only path is shippable today.

Whitelist mirrors rt#32-M's 14-global mitigation attempt: env_var_names, env_var_vals, env_scopes, env_scope_dirty, env_cache_names, env_cache_idxs, env_vars, env_cache, env_fns, fn_cache, call_stack, defer_stack, gen_buffer, call_arg_buf.

blocker_push_arena_persists.description: Even with snapshot-wrap emitted at 13 hot-global capture sites in hexa_full.hexa, enabling HEXA_ARRAY_PUSH_ARENA=1 crashes fib(2) with SIGSEGV. Minimal repro: `fn f(n) { if n<=1 return n; return f(n-1)+f(n-2) }; f(2)`. Single-recursion variants (f(n) { return f(n-1)+1 }) survive; double-recursion in one expression is the trigger.
blocker_push_arena_persists.root_cause: Conservative hot-global whitelist does not cover caller-local fn-argument escapes. When f(n-1) returns, its arena mark is popped, but the outer call's args tuple (constructed via hexa_array_push into the shared call_arg_buf) may have items-pointer aliases to frames that got rewound. Snapshot-wrap only protects `let x = GLOBAL` patterns; fn-argument evaluation needs its own wrapping pass (task point 3 — skipped in this conservative pass).
blocker_push_arena_persists.next_step_rt32_O: Widen the transpiler to wrap NK_CALL argument evaluation in `hexa_val_snapshot_array(...)` for args whose source expression may capture an array. This requires either (a) a conservative type-probe at codegen (any Ident RHS whose name lives in scope as an array — cheap heuristic), or (b) unconditional wrap on all args (4M+ extra calls/fib run, measured cost TBD).

fib_K30_437k_calls.rss_unmet_root_cause: push-arena gate off (see blocker_push_arena_persists). Without push-arena firing on the 4.6M non-slice_fast array_new calls, there is no additional RSS lever. Snapshot wrapping at 13 sites contributes zero runtime stats (arr_arena_heapify=0 with push-arena off — the sites never see arena-backed values since arena-alloc path not taken).
